---
title: "Armand Bashige"
image: armand.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/armand-bashige
    - icon: github
      text: Github (Data Science Projects)
      href: https://github.com/Bashigea
    - icon: github
      text: Github (Software Engineering Projects)
      href: https://github.com/Bashgea

---

I am a senior at Augsburg University pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science with minors in Data Science and Mathematics. I am passionate about leveraging my problem-solving skills to develop innovative solutions that create meaningful impact. With a strong foundation in Python and Java, I have hands-on experience implementing data structures, algorithms, and core software development principles. I am particularly interested in building efficient, scalable systems and applying data-driven approaches to real-world challenges.
